2605.23694.title: ChartFI: Benchmarking Faithfulness and Insightfulness of Chart Descriptions from Multimodal Large Language Models
2605.23694.paper_summary: Chart descriptions are essential for accessibility, cross-modal retrieval, and assisting readers in extracting insights from complex visualizations. As multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly adopted for automated chart description generation, a critical question arises: how faithfully and insightfully do these models actually describe charts? Current benchmarks fall short on two fronts: existing datasets consist of simple, homogeneous charts paired with shallow, fact-enumerating descriptions; and prevailing metrics fail to capture the multi-faceted nature of description quality. To address these gaps, we present the Chart Faithfulness and Insightfulness Benchmark (ChartFI-Bench). We first summarize four dimensions that characterize high-quality chart descriptions: factual accuracy, salient feature emphasis, domain-informed guidance, and chart-text complementarity. Guided by these dimensions, we construct a high-quality benchmark comprising 896 chart-description pairs, which feature visually complex charts and semantically rich descriptions. Furthermore, we design four aligned evaluation metrics -- Faithfulness, Coverage, Informativeness, and Acuity -- to systematically assess the quality of descriptions across these dimensions. Experiments conducted on mainstream MLLMs demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework and reveal common weaknesses among existing models.
2605.23694.paper_summary_zh: 圖表描述對於可及性、跨模態檢索以及幫助讀者從複雜可視化中提取見解至關重要。隨著多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在自動圖表描述生成中的日益採用，一個關鍵問題浮現：這些模型實際上是多麼忠實和深入地描述圖表？當前的基準在兩個方面存在不足：現有數據集由簡單、同質的圖表組成，並配有淺顯的事實列舉描述；而現有的度量標準未能捕捉描述質量的多面性。為了解決這些缺口，我們提出了圖表忠實性與洞察力基準（ChartFI-Bench）。我們首先總結了四個特徵高質量圖表描述的維度：事實準確性、顯著特徵強調、領域知識指導和圖表-文本互補性。在這些維度的指導下，我們構建了一個高質量的基準，包含896對圖表描述，這些圖表具有視覺上的複雜性和語義豐富的描述。此外，我們設計了四個對應的評估指標——忠實性、覆蓋率、信息量和敏銳度——以系統性地評估這些維度下的描述質量。在主流MLLMs上進行的實驗證明了所提出框架的有效性，並揭示了現有模型的共同弱點。
2605.23694.author: Fen Wang et.al.
2605.23694.authors: Fen Wang, Zekai Shao, Qiman Kang, Chunran Hu, Zhixuan Zhang, Lexu Xie, Chao Liu, Siming Chen
